{{Card Infobox|Byrd Swoop||2}}
{{C|Byrd Swoop||2}} is a 0 {{Icon|CE|2}} cost {{QueryLink|Cards|color:Colorless|Colorless|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Event&color:Colorless|Event|2}} {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Attack&color:Colorless|Attack|2}} Card. It deals 14 (18 if upgraded) damage.

== Obtaining Byrd Swoop ==
* {{C|Byrd Swoop||2}} is an Event Card, and the only way to obtain it is by taking the {{C|Byrdonis Egg||2}} from the event {{E|Byrdonis Nest|2}} then hatching it a {{StS2|Rest Sites|Rest Site}}.
